description_long: This object is a rectangular storage locker structure with a corrugated metal roof and brick-patterned walls, designed for secure storage in urban environments. The front features two large, dark-colored doors, one of which is open to reveal a spacious interior compartment, likely for storing equipment or vehicles. The doors appear to be made of metal and are equipped with visible locking mechanisms and handles for secure access. The side and rear walls are solid brick, providing durability and security, while the roof is slightly pitched for water runoff. The overall construction suggests robustness and weather resistance, suitable for outdoor placement. The interior is partially visible, showing ample space and a clean, utilitarian design.
description: A robust brick and metal storage locker with a corrugated roof, double front doors, and secure locking mechanisms, suitable for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large metal doors, one open to reveal the interior, with visible handles and locking mechanisms.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid brick wall and the corrugated metal roof, with no visible doors or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous brick wall and the full width of the corrugated roof, with no access points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid brick wall and a partial glimpse of the open door and interior from the front.
